title: Ores Remastered
description: Enhance your Minecraft mining experience with a resource pack that makes finding ores a breeze! This pack adds a subtle, color-coded border to each ore block, allowing you to quickly spot valuable resources from a distance.
body:
_____________________________________________________________________________________________ ![Ores Remastered](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2624b63d7a2557a9af4597e486a84e9102fb62cd.png)

Enhance your mining experience

### This pack adds a subtle, color-coded border to each ore block, allowing you to quickly spot valuable resources from a distance.
![Diamond side by side.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40e55917cabf45cb51d3a90a74f094b2fd1a1c0.png) The borders are designed to be non-intrusive, maintaining the game's original aesthetic while providing a helpful visual cue. Spend less time searching and more time building! Join the discord for updates on my latest projects and submit your ideas.
